title: stelis ornata
intro: Stelis ornata, a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Stelis ornata include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the body from infections and diseases. In traditional herbal medicine, Stelis ornata is prepared in various ways, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
